name: VDA5050 Publish
info:
Publish a VDA5050 order message to MQTT with auto-sequence-number.

Input: 
  msg.payload.manufacturer = robot manufacturer (e.g. 'KUKA')
  msg.payload.serialNumber = robot serial
  msg.payload.topicSuffix = 'order' | 'instantActions' | 'state'
  msg.payload.body = VDA5050 message body (without header)

Output: msg.payload = { mid, sequenceNumber, topic }

nodes.name: build VDA5050 message
